description_long: This object is a small, colorful biplane with a boxy fuselage and two sets of parallel wings stacked vertically. The wings are painted in bright horizontal stripes of yellow, green, blue, and light blue, while the fuselage features a mix of red, black, and pink. The tail section is green with a black rudder, and the propeller is mounted at the front. The landing gear consists of two simple black struts supporting the main body. The background panel is decorated with a blue sky and white clouds, suggesting a playful or decorative context.
description: A small, boxy biplane with brightly colored striped wings and a green tail, featuring a front-mounted propeller and simple landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stacked biplane wings, front propeller, and colorful fuselage details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, striped wings, and green tail fin.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the colorful wings and minimal visibility of the fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same thin profile and tail structure as view 1.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing biplane configuration with two parallel, straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail support.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit integrated into the front section of the fuselage.
